name: getFlagShowQuasars
description: Returns whether quasars are displayed on the sky.

name: setFlagShowQuasars
description: Shows or hides quasars on the sky.
example: Quasars.setFlagShowQuasars(true);

name: quasarsVisible
description: Property that controls whether quasars are displayed.
example:
var visible = core.getStelProperty('Quasars.quasarsVisible');
core.setStelProperty('Quasars.quasarsVisible', true);

name: getFlagUseQuasarMarkers
description: Returns whether markers (icons) are used to display quasars instead of simple distribution points.
returnDescription: true if markers are used, false if distribution mode is used

name: setFlagUseQuasarMarkers
description: Sets whether markers (icons) should be used to display quasars.

parameters.name: useMarkers
parameters.description: true to use markers, false to use distribution points

name: flagMarkersMode
description: Property that controls whether markers are used for quasars.
returnDescription: true if markers are used, false for distribution mode
example: core.setStelProperty('Quasars.flagMarkersMode', true);

name: getDisplayMode
description: Returns whether distribution mode is enabled for quasars (showing density distribution rather than individual markers).
returnDescription: true if distribution mode is enabled, false if not

name: setDisplayMode
description: Enables or disables distribution mode for quasars (showing density distribution rather than individual markers).

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable distribution mode, false to disable

name: flagDisplayMode
description: Property that controls whether quasar distribution mode is enabled.
returnDescription: true if distribution mode is enabled
example: core.setStelProperty('Quasars.flagDisplayMode', true);

name: getMarkerColor
description: ⚠️ Returns the color for quasar markers. Use the property quasarsColor for reading via core.getStelProperty().
example: var colorStr = core.getStelProperty('Quasars.quasarsColor');

name: setMarkerColor
description: Sets the color for quasar markers.
example:
var red = core.vec3f(1.0, 0.2, 0.2);
Quasars.setMarkerColor(red);

name: quasarsColor
description: ⚠️ Property that returns the quasar marker color as a string. For reading, use core.getStelProperty(). For writing, use Quasars.setMarkerColor().

name: getCountQuasars
description: Returns the number of quasars currently loaded in the catalog. The default catalog contains approximately 160,000 quasars.
returnDescription: Number of quasars in the catalog
example:
var count = Quasars.getCountQuasars();
core.debug("Quasars in catalog: " + count);

name: getUpdatesEnabled
description: Returns whether automatic updates of the quasar catalog from the internet are enabled.
returnDescription: true if automatic updates are enabled, false if disabled

name: setUpdatesEnabled
description: Enables or disables automatic updates of the quasar catalog from the internet.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable automatic updates, false to disable

name: updateJSON
description: Manually triggers an immediate update of the quasar catalog JSON file from the configured online source (default: https://stellarium.org/json/quasars.json).

name: getLastUpdate
description: Returns the date and time of the last successful quasar catalog update.
returnDescription: Date and time of last catalog update
example:
var lastUpdate = Quasars.getLastUpdate();
core.debug("Last quasar catalog update: " + lastUpdate.toString());

name: getUpdateFrequencyDays
description: Returns the frequency of automatic catalog updates in days. Default is 100 days.
example:
var freq = Quasars.getUpdateFrequencyDays();
core.debug("Update frequency: " + freq + " days");

name: setUpdateFrequencyDays
description: Sets the frequency of automatic catalog updates in days.

name: getSecondsToUpdate
description: Returns the number of seconds until the next scheduled automatic catalog update.
example:
var secs = Quasars.getSecondsToUpdate();
core.debug("Next update in: " + secs + " seconds");

name: getUpdateState
description: Returns the current update state. Values: 0=Updating, 1=CompleteNoUpdates, 2=CompleteUpdates, 3=DownloadError, 4=OtherError.

name: getEnableAtStartup
description: Returns whether the Quasars plugin should be enabled automatically when Stellarium starts.
returnDescription: true if enabled at startup, false otherwise

name: setEnableAtStartup
description: Sets whether the Quasars plugin should be enabled automatically when Stellarium starts.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable at startup, false to disable

name: getFlagShowQuasarsButton
description: Returns whether the Quasars plugin toolbar button is visible in the Stellarium GUI.
returnDescription: true if button is visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagShowQuasarsButton
description: Shows or hides the Quasars plugin toolbar button in the Stellarium GUI.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show button, false to hide

name: restoreDefaults
description: Restores all Quasars plugin settings and catalog to their default values. This will reset visibility, colors, update settings, and replace the catalog file.

name: getByID
description: Returns a quasar object by its designation ID.
returnDescription: Quasar object, or null if not found

name: getAllQuasars
description: Returns the list of all quasar objects currently loaded in the catalog.

name: searchByID
description: Searches for a quasar by its designation ID. Returns a StelObjectP that can be used with core.moveToObject() and other object functions.
returnDescription: Quasar as StelObject, or null if not found

compatibility.notes: Alternative to getByID() that returns StelObjectP

name: searchByName
description: Searches for a quasar by its English name or designation.
returnDescription: Quasar object, or null if not found

name: listAllObjects
description: Returns a list of all quasar objects with their names. This can be used for auto-completion and search.

parameters.name: inEnglish
parameters.description: true to list English names, false for translated names

example:
var objects = Quasars.listAllObjects(false);
core.debug("Total quasars in catalog: " + objects.length);

name: getName
description: Returns the display name of the Quasars plugin module.
example:
var name = Quasars.getName();
core.debug("Module: " + name);

name: getStelObjectType
description: Returns the object type identifier for quasars. Used by StelObjectMgr to identify objects from this module.
example:
var objType = Quasars.getStelObjectType();
core.debug("Object type: " + objType); // Returns 'Quasar'
